scripts.build:customer: set VITE_APP=customer&& vite build && copy /Y dist\customer\customer.html dist\customer\index.html
scripts.build:admin: set VITE_APP=admin&& vite build && copy /Y dist\admin\admin.html dist\admin\index.html
scripts.build:driver: set VITE_APP=driver&& vite build && copy /Y dist\driver\driver.html dist\driver\index.html
scripts.build:all: npm run build:customer && npm run build:admin && npm run build:driver
scripts.cap:add:admin: copy /Y capacitor.admin.json capacitor.config.json && node node_modules/@capacitor/cli/bin/capacitor add android
scripts.cap:add:driver: copy /Y capacitor.driver.json capacitor.config.json && node node_modules/@capacitor/cli/bin/capacitor add android
scripts.cap:sync:customer: copy /Y capacitor.customer.json capacitor.config.json && node node_modules/@capacitor/cli/bin/capacitor sync android
scripts.cap:sync:admin: copy /Y capacitor.admin.json capacitor.config.json && node node_modules/@capacitor/cli/bin/capacitor sync android
scripts.cap:sync:driver: copy /Y capacitor.driver.json capacitor.config.json && node node_modules/@capacitor/cli/bin/capacitor sync android
scripts.cap:open:customer: copy /Y capacitor.customer.json capacitor.config.json && node node_modules/@capacitor/cli/bin/capacitor open android
scripts.cap:open:admin: copy /Y capacitor.admin.json capacitor.config.json && node node_modules/@capacitor/cli/bin/capacitor open android
scripts.cap:open:driver: copy /Y capacitor.driver.json capacitor.config.json && node node_modules/@capacitor/cli/bin/capacitor open android
scripts.apk:customer: npm run build:customer && npm run cap:sync:customer && copy /Y capacitor.customer.json capacitor.config.json && cd android && .\gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.apk:admin: npm run build:admin && npm run cap:sync:admin && copy /Y capacitor.admin.json capacitor.config.json && cd android-admin && .\gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.apk:driver: npm run build:driver && npm run cap:sync:driver && copy /Y capacitor.driver.json capacitor.config.json && cd android-driver && .\gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.apk:all: npm run build:all && npm run apk:customer && npm run apk:admin && npm run apk:driver
